PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?race(SAMPLE(?raceLabel) AS ?raceLabel) WHERE {
  wd:Q17015440 p:P710 ?preaknessPart .
  ?preaknessPart ps:P710 wd:Q5755348 ; pq:P1923 ?jockey .
  ?race p:P710 ?winPart .
  ?winPart ps:P710 wd:Q5755348 ; pq:P1923 ?jockey ; pq:P4724 "1" .
  ?race rdfs:label ?raceLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?raceLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(CONTAINS(?raceLabel , "Gold Cup"))
}
GROUP BY ?race
LIMIT 1
